Fields.Name: Target Map ID
Fields.Description: Specify the target map ID. Legacy only. (m12_34_56_78  12345678). Initially it was only legacy, but it also supports open celestial sphere maps

Fields.Name: Target Event ID
Fields.Description: If you enter the target natural disaster event ID from 300, 310, 311 and 312, it will be [natural disaster replacement data]. If it is 0 or blank, it will be [Regional ID switching data] (SEQ16039).

Fields.Name: Replacement Source Asset ID - Min Range
Fields.Description: Replacement source asset ID range specification Min

Fields.Name: Replacement Source Asset ID - Max Range
Fields.Description: Replacement source asset ID range specification Max

Fields.Name: Replacement Destination Asset ID - Min Range
Fields.Description: Replacement destination asset ID range specification Min

Fields.Name: Replacement Destination Asset ID - Max Range
Fields.Description: Replacement destination asset ID range specification Max

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region ID [0]
Fields.Description: MapGD Local ID restriction 0 Valid only when Natural disaster event ID is 0. The part is valid only with the MapGD local ID you set (SEQ16039).

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region ID [1]
Fields.Description: MapGD Local ID Restriction 1 Valid only when Natural Disaster Event ID is 0. The part is valid only with the MapGD local ID you set (SEQ16039).

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region ID [2]
Fields.Description: MapGD Local ID restriction 2 Valid only when Natural disaster event ID is 0. The part is valid only with the MapGD local ID you set (SEQ16039).

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region ID [3]
Fields.Description: MapGD Local ID restriction 3 Valid only when Natural disaster event ID is 0. The part is valid only with the MapGD local ID you set (SEQ16039).

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region Asset ID
Fields.Description: MapGD Valid assets specified by local ID AssetId AEG123_456_9999  123456

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region Parts ID
Fields.Description: MapGD Valid assets specified by local ID PartsNo AEG123_456_9999  9999

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region Asset ID - Range Min
Fields.Description: MapGD Valid asset specification with local ID Asset ID range specification Min

Fields.Name: Limited Map Region Asset ID - Range Max
Fields.Description: MapGD Valid asset specification for local ID Asset ID range specification Max
